Commissioner, Empowerment of Persons with Disabilities, Pune dated 13.03.2026 (1781443)
The daily letter.
The memo: -

Reference No. 1 to the prescribed procedure to be followed before payment of salary and non-salaried dues of teachers / non-teaching staff in Special Non-Government Schools / Workshops for Persons with Disabilities. The directions have been issued vide Government Circular No.1 dated 13th September, 2022 in Reference No. Instructions have been issued for scrutiny and submission of proposals as per the Scrutiny List prescribed vide letter dated 27.09.2023.

Accordingly, the following funds are being disbursed to the Non-Governmental Organizations working for persons with osteoporosis (Programme), 31-Auxiliary Grants (Non-Payment) grant as per the non-payment proposal of Adarsh Gramin Mahila Mandal, Takli Dhokeshwar Operated Residential School for Disabled (Matimand Boys & Girls), Nepti Campus, Ahilyanagar received by the Department from the Commissioner, Empowerment of Persons with Disabilities, Pune.
